notes: The trusted harness uses means only to construct and score the canonical oracle; the algorithm receives only the oracle handle, k, and public circuit limits.
The two exact-grid cases test complete durable Top-k output and inverse cleanup under the explicit rounding promise.
The generic off-grid case must expose rank-copy entanglement and fail closed rather than silently discard garbage.
The exact boundary tie must clean but reject the non-strict Top-k relation.
This tiny exact-state panel is circuit-semantic evidence only; it is not a certificate, query-complexity separation, hardware result, new quantum advantage, or CCF-A claim.
